Package org.areslib.core

Class AllianceUtil

java.lang.Object
org.areslib.core.AllianceUtil
public class AllianceUtil extends Object
Utility for detecting and handling alliance color in FTC matches.

In FTC, the alliance color is typically determined by the OpMode name convention or by reading from the Driver Station. This utility provides a centralized way to track alliance state for coordinate flipping, autonomous mirroring, and LED color selection.

Canonical Alliance Type: This class uses FieldConstants.Alliance as the single source of truth for alliance identity. There is no separate Alliance enum here to prevent duplication and import confusion.

  • Constructor Details

    • AllianceUtil

      public AllianceUtil()

  • Method Details

    • setAlliance

      public static void setAlliance(FieldConstants.Alliance alliance)
      Sets the current alliance. Should be called during initialization based on the selected OpMode.
      Parameters:
      alliance - The alliance color for this match.

    • getAlliance

      public static FieldConstants.Alliance getAlliance()
      Returns the current alliance.
      Returns:
      The alliance color.

    • isRed

      public static boolean isRed()
      Returns true if the current alliance is Red.
      Returns:
      True if Red alliance.

    • isBlue

      public static boolean isBlue()
      Returns true if the current alliance is Blue.
      Returns:
      True if Blue alliance.

    • flipX

      public static double flipX(double x)
      Flips an X coordinate for coordinate mirroring between alliances. In FTC, the field is symmetric about the center, so Red-side coordinates need to be negated when running Blue-side autonomous routines.
      Parameters:
      x - The X coordinate in Red-alliance frame.
      Returns:
      The equivalent X coordinate for the current alliance.

    • flipHeading

      public static double flipHeading(double headingRadians)
      Flips a heading angle for the opposite alliance side.
      Parameters:
      headingRadians - The heading in Red-alliance frame (radians).
      Returns:
      The equivalent heading for the current alliance.

    • getHeadingOffsetRadians

      public static double getHeadingOffsetRadians()
      Returns the field-centric heading offset for the current alliance. This offset accounts for driver station position on the field wall.
      Returns:
      The heading offset in radians to apply for field-centric driving.

    • reset

      public static void reset()
      Resets the alliance to the default (Red).
